nodes.title: Get Businesses List
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses. Returns array of all businesses with stats (stations, employees, accounts counts). No auth required for list. Returns 200 with [{id, name, code, icon, color, ...}].

nodes.title: Get Stations By Business
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/stations. Returns array of stations for business. Requires bizId auth. Returns 200 with [{id, name, code, location, billingSystems, ...}].
